content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.5% with broad sectoral participation (Realty +2.4%, Metal +0.9%, Pharma +0.8%, Power), but IT weak (-1%) and VIX at 18.25 elevated. Several names hit fresh 52w-highs on volume (BANDHANBNK 8.2x, ADANIPORTS, GESHIP) signaling momentum, but most have already had big runs intraday — chasing the highs is poor R:R. Book is well-diversified (11 positions, 56% deployed) with multiple winners that need SL trailing rather than new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.2% winner, CMP 1044, intraday faded from 1057 high to 1044. Current SL 1035 is only 0.9% below CMP — too tight, risks self-stopout on normal noise. Loosening would violate MODIFY rule (SL only tightens). Keep SL at 1035 effectively but adjust to 1025 — wait, that would loosen. Reverting: HOLD existing SL 1035 since it already locks in +5% gain and is appropriately tight on a position showing intraday weakness. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1035 already locks in +5% gain (entry 984). CMP 1044, faded from intraday high 1057 — SL appropriately positioned 0.9% below CMP given the weakness. Target 1110 intact (Goldman TP 1184, MS TP 1520 supports upside). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF -2.2%. SL 119 is 2.7% below CMP 122.26 — appropriate buffer. Bullish gold thesis intact (CB buying, geopolitical premium). Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL 23.85 already at breakeven-level (entry 23.65). Switching to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7% winner. SL 23.85 above entry 23.65 (breakeven+) is well-placed; CMP 24.03 → SL 0.75% below CMP, slightly tight but acceptable for low-vol ETF. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 935.00,
      "new_target": 990.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 950 is ABOVE current CMP 949.55 — guaranteed self-stopout on next downtick. This is the exact failure mode flagged: SL flush with/above CMP. Loosening SL is normally not allowed, but stored SL above CMP is a broken state. Actually: rule says SL can only TIGHTEN. So I cannot loosen 950→935. Must EXIT instead since SL is effectively triggered. Switching action."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 50,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 950 is above CMP 949.55 — position is effectively already stopped. Per state-verification: 950 > 949.55 confirms SL>CMP for a long, which is a forced exit condition. Lock in marginal gain (~+0.6% above entry 944) cleanly via MARKET rather than wait for the SL to trigger at slightly worse price. Bajfinance Q4 was strong, can re-enter on cleaner setup later."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2% winner. Trail SL from 1700 (breakeven) up to 1710 to lock small gain. CMP 1729.50 → new SL 1710 is 1.1% below CMP, respects 0.5% trail-gap rule. Q4 strong (PAT +9.4%, EBITDA +20%, record cargo), Jefferies positive, dividend record date Jun 12. Target 1790 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, faded from 1590 morning high to 1534 (bearish intraday reversal but still above SL 1510). Q4 results May 14 is binary catalyst within 8 trading sessions — outside the 3-session binary-event rule. SL 1510 = 1.6% below CMP, appropriate. Hold but watch for further weakness."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.1%, faded from 13976 high to 13514. SL 13400 = 0.8% below CMP 13514 — getting tight but holding above. Strong April sales (+33% YoY), GST cut tailwind. Thesis intact, give space to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4% but volume 8.2x and broke 52-wk high earlier (212.66). Faded to 207.79 but well above SL 204. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, GNPA improving, brokerage targets 210-220. Hold for continuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% intraday from entry, but stock up 4.81% on day with strong defence catalyst (BHEL beat, F414 deal, new CMD). SL 4480 = 1.8% below CMP 4561, appropriate buffer. Target 4790 intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.6%, leading realty sector. BUT board meeting May 11 (Q4 results + dividend) is 5 trading sessions away — close to 3-session binary window. SL 495 = 2.7% below CMP 508.90, appropriate. Hold; will reassess closer to event for trim-into-results decision."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting TODAY — within 3-session binary window per rule 11. Position is small (-0.7%, ~5% of cap), SL 360 = 3.4% below CMP 372.75 is appropriate buffer for results-day chop. Choosing option (b): SL stays tight, position size already modest at ~5% of cap. Hold through results given small size and positive Q3 momentum + Hyundai/Kia EV MoU."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1035.00, "reasoning": "SL locks +5% gain, well-positioned"},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 119.00, "reasoning": "Defensive hold, SL 2.7% below CMP"},
    {"symbol": "PHARMABEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 23.85, "reasoning": "SL above entry, breakeven+ locked"},
    {"symbol": "BAJFINANCE", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Stored SL 950 > CMP 949.55 — forced exit, clean close at MARKET"},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1710.00, "reasoning": "Trail above breakeven into strength"},
    {"symbol": "GESHIP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1510.00, "reasoning": "Intraday fade but above SL, May 14 results outside 3-day window"},
    {"symbol": "MARUTI", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 13400.00, "reasoning": "SL holding, strong April volumes thesis intact"},
    {"symbol": "BANDHANBNK", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 204.00, "reasoning": "Volume momentum + Q4 beat thesis intact"},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4480.00, "reasoning": "Defence breakout day, SL 1.8% below CMP"},
    {"symbol": "ANANTRAJ", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 495.00, "reasoning": "Realty leader, May 11 results approaching binary window"},
    {"symbol": "EXIDEIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 360.00, "reasoning": "Results today; small size + 3.4% SL buffer = option (b) per binary-event rule"}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL, BAJAJ-AUTO, SYNGENE, ADANIGREEN, RRKABEL, RELIANCE, KOTAKBANK, CESC, ADANIPOWER, DLF, SUNPHARMA, LAURUSLABS, LALPATHLAB, CONCORDBIO, MANAPPURAM — none added today. Book is already 56% deployed across 11 names. CESC has board meeting May 6 (binary risk). ADANIPOWER on cooldown (recent re-entry rule). KOTAKBANK contrarian thesis intact at 372 support but no urgency. Most momentum names already +5-12% on day — chasing intraday highs is poor R:R. Will reconsider on pullbacks or fresh setups tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 15: book diversified across Financials (PNBHOUSING, BAJFINANCE→exit, BANDHANBNK), Auto (MARUTI, EXIDEIND), Defence (HAL), Pharma/ETF (PHARMABEES), Realty (ANANTRAJ), Services/Logistics (ADANIPORTS, GESHIP), Gold ETF. After BAJFINANCE exit, deployed will drop to ~52%, cash ~48% — comfortable buffer. Key learning: BAJFINANCE entered with SL 950 vs entry 944 (only 0.6% gap below entry) — too tight at entry given typical NBFC intraday range. Future entries: SL gap from entry should be at least 1.5-2% to absorb normal noise without forcing same-day stopouts. Two binary events in book within 1 week (EXIDEIND today, ANANTRAJ May 11, CESC May 6 if added) — already at limit, no new adds with imminent results."
}
